title: Backend Developer Vacancy at VMware India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at VMware India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
VMware India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About VMware India:
VMware India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India!
